description:
Enable the Folder Download feature in JFrog Artifactory with a Max Folder Download Size of 500 MB. Download the 'org/apache/commons/commons-io/2.15.1' folder from the 'example-repo-local' repository as a ZIP archive to /home/ga/Desktop/commons-io-package.zip.

Starting state: Artifactory is running. You are logged in as admin. The artifacts are already deployed in 'example-repo-local'.
